_comment: ClickUp person -> Projector staff email. Keyed by ClickUp email (lowercased). Used for comment authorship and task assignees. `null` = deliberately unmapped (their comments are skipped and logged, they're never assigned). Reviewed 2026-07-04: all Evoke staff share their @crtr.co.uk email across both systems; only Elaine (external homesforstudents contact) is unmapped.
